verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Jesus on the mainline Tell Him what you want Jesus on the mainline Tell Him what you want Jesus on the mainline Tell Him what you want Jesus on the mainline now

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: I can feel his Spirit moving in my soul (x3) Jesus on the mainline now

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Tell him now, tell him now Tell him what you want Jesus on the mainline now

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: If you want Salvation, If you want you healing, if you want deliverance Jesus on the mainline now.
